results.title: How to build an ATS-Compliant CV for international remote tech roles
results.description: You know the feeling when you spot a remote DevOps or Full-Stack job based in London or New York. The salary is in US Dollars or British Pounds, the perks look amazing, and you match the requirements perfectly. The post How to build an ATS-Compliant CV for international remote tech roles appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: Galaxy A27 retail box leak reveals colors, price, and more
results.description: Samsung is always developing new smartphones. One of the devices that it is currently working on is the Galaxy A27. So far, there have been plenty of leaks about it, revealing its design and features. Now, we have one more. This one shows the phone’s retail box, as well as reveals its color options and [...]

results.title: B35 bullet train project: NHSRCL begins capability assessment for 350 kmph high-speed train development
results.description: NHSRCL has initiated a capability assessment for the B35 bullet train project, aimed at developing high-speed trains capable of operating at 350 kmph.
